name: Fat Cat
author: Poki
description: Fatcat is a shootem up made by Nitrome. Soar across city skies to defeat hardcore germs! Steer the cat and mouse out of trouble's way. You can fire the fowl's blaster rays at all times. Feed your feline with cake to energize his abilities and activate the mega-burp! How to play: Moving the mouse : Move around with the arrow keys Hold down the left mouse button to shoot Moving the cat : Move around with WASD Feed the cat to unleash a mega-laser About the creator: Fatcat was created by Nitrome as a flash game, and later emulated in HTML5 by AwayFL for Poki. Play Nitrome's other flash games on Poki: Swindler 2 , Avalanche , Cave Chaos 2 , Enemy 585 , Silly Sausage , Swindler , Coil , Cold Storage , Twin Shot 2 , Bad Ice-Cream , Bad Ice-Cream 2 , Bad Ice-Cream 3 , Cave Chaos , Mutiny , Skywire , Twin Shot , Test Subject Green and Test Subject Blue
